camera: Clean centered game-token shot of a single subject, viewed from slightly above at a three-quarter angle, the subject filling most of the frame with a little margin.
style: Photorealistic, richly detailed, soft even studio lighting, crisp sharp focus, true-to-life materials and textures — like a real object photographed for a product catalog, not an illustration, render, or cartoon.
background: Fully transparent background — the subject completely isolated with no backdrop, no scenery, no ground and no shadow, a clean cut-out sprite.
constraints: Exactly one subject, centered. No text, no logos, no watermarks, no labels, no callout lines, no borders, no drop shadow outside the subject.
